consistency.naming_convention: Consistent. 'Prayer of Healing' matches the slug.
consistency.structure: Complete. Contains all expected fields for a spell entry.
consistency.level_scaling: Consistent. Healing scales predictably at higher levels (1d8 per slot level above 2nd).

quality.completeness: High. All mechanical and descriptive elements are present.
quality.clarity: High. The description clearly defines target count (up to six), range, effect (HP regain), and limitations (undead/constructs).
quality.formatting: Good. Uses bolding for the 'At Higher Levels' section.

mechanics.effect: Heals up to 6 creatures within range for 2d8 + modifier HP.
mechanics.scaling_mechanism: Additive dice increase (1d8 per slot level above 2nd).

recommendations: None. The data appears accurate and complete according to standard TTRPG spell schema.
